question: Can transparent 60-day realized-volatility targeting at 15% annual risk repair the exposed fixed-size TRX 180-day monthly trend drawdown while preserving post-cost, post-hurdle returns in untouched rule-level periods?
relationship_to_prior_work: Post-development risk-management follow-up. Parent fixed-size development and failure are exposed calibration; parent evaluation and confirmation are unopened.
development_gate: stress after 4% hurdle >0; max drawdown >-20% and better than same-target always-long; 12%/18% target returns >0; turnover <=8; data PASS
evaluation_gate: stress after hurdle >0; both years positive; max drawdown >-15% and better than same-target always-long; 12%/18% >0; data PASS
confirmation_gate: stress after hurdle >0; both slices positive; max drawdown >-12% and better than same-target always-long; 12%/18% >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0; data PASS
holdout_release_rule: reuse exposed development after checkpoint; fetch evaluation only after development pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
